title: validate-resume MCP Tool Contract
description: Validates markdown-formatted resume content against the expected resume format schema

tool.name: validate-resume
tool.description: Validates markdown resume content against template schema. Returns validation results with specific errors and guidance for corrections.

strict.description: Enable strict validation mode (optional, default: false)
